title: euodia mannii
intro: Euodia mannii, also known as Chinese pepper tree or Chinese prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Euodia mannii is rich in bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, providing numerous health benefits including pain relief, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
